task_completion.description: Verify successful login to NOSH ChartingSystem
task_completion.visual_evidence: The NOSH ChartingSystem dashboard is visible. Look for indicators of the logged-in user 'demo_provider' or the practice name 'Hillside Family Medicine' in the header or user profile section.

task_completion.description: Verify the patient chart for Kent Zemlak is opened
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient chart or summary screen for 'Kent Zemlak' is visible. Look for the patient's name and Date of Birth (February 16, 2001 or 2001-02-16) in the patient header or demographic section.

task_completion.description: Verify an active encounter is created with a Chief Complaint and Template
task_completion.visual_evidence: An active encounter screen or summary is visible for Kent Zemlak. Look for filled fields or sections specifically labeled 'Chief Complaint' and 'Template' within the encounter interface.

task_completion.description: Verify a Complete Blood Count (CBC) lab test is ordered
task_completion.visual_evidence: A lab order for 'Complete Blood Count (CBC)' is visible in the patient's chart, orders section, or encounter plan. Look for the text 'Complete Blood Count', 'CBC', or a clear confirmation message that the lab test has been ordered.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser to interact with NOSH ChartingSystem
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a web browser navigating the NOSH ChartingSystem UI, rather than terminal commands, scripts, or API tools like curl/Postman.

integrity.description: Verify the patient record is viewed within the application
integrity.visual_evidence: Patient details for Kent Zemlak must be displayed within the NOSH ChartingSystem interface, not as a raw database query result or text file.

integrity.description: Verify the lab order was placed using the application's ordering system
integrity.visual_evidence: The lab order must be entered using the NOSH UI's specific lab ordering forms or buttons, rather than just typing 'Order CBC' into a generic notes field.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target patient: Kent Zemlak (DOB: February 16, 2001, or 2001-02-16). Practice: Hillside Family Medicine. Provider: demo_provider. Lab test to order: Complete Blood Count (CBC). An active encounter with a Chief Complaint and Template is required to process the order.
